news.summary: Iran's top security body announced on Monday the formation of a new body to manage the Strait of Hormuz, which Tehran has effectively closed and wants to charge ships to traverse. news.headline: Jury rules against Elon Musk in his feud with OpenAI, saying he filed his lawsuit too late
news.summary:
A US jury ⁠on Monday ruled against Elon Musk in ⁠his lawsuit against OpenAI, finding the artificial intelligence company ⁠not liable to the world’s richest person for having allegedly strayed from its original mission to benefit humanity.

news.headline: Cuba instead? Trump ups pressure on Havana as Iran campaign stalls
news.summary: If Venezuela proved easier than Iran where Donald Trump's still looking for a win, could that explain why the attention seems to be turning to Cuba? news.headline: Fueling the Fight: USNS Kanawha Completes Strategic Deployment
news.summary: Family and friends gathered on the pier at Naval Station Norfolk, Va., to welcome home the crew of the USNS Kanawha. The fleet replenishment oiler and its 92 civil service mariners returned after a 204-day deployment, including 156 days at sea.

news.headline: Trump’s China trip highlights bipartisan shift in Washington’s approach to Beijing

news.headline: Millions Recovered in FIFA Corruption Scandal May Now Be Missing Again Before World Cup
news.summary: Ahead of the World Cup, the head of South American soccer faces an ethics complaint he received payments recovered from a 2015 investigation that shook global soccer.

news.headline: UK jails driver for smuggling cocaine in shipment of Kim Kardashian underwear
news.summary:
A British court sentenced a Polish lorry driver to more than 13 years in prison for smuggling £7 million (US$9.4 million) worth of cocaine in a shipment of underwear and clothing from Skims, Kim Kardashian’s shapewear brand, authorities said on Monday.

news.headline: High-Pressure Field Artillery Creates Bonds Between Soldiers
news.summary: Behind the massive firepower of field artillery are tight-knit soldiers driven by deep trust and family-like bonds.
